name: RenderMeshes
summary: RenderMeshes is a collection of geometry instances for a given ObjectId typically returned by the Custom Render primitive system. As each set of primitives is returned by the RenderMeshProviders in turn, the running hash is updated with new information about the primitive modifications that have been made along the way.

constructors.name: RenderMeshes(RhinoDoc, Guid, Guid, UInt32)
constructors.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute] public RenderMeshes(RhinoDoc doc, Guid objectId, Guid renderMeshProviderId, uint runningHash)
constructors.summary: Create a new render primitives collection.

params.name: doc
params.doc: The Rhino document with which this collection will be associated.

params.name: objectId
params.doc: The ObjectId that this collection is for.

params.name: renderMeshProviderId
params.doc: The RenderMeshProvider that created this collection - if this is the first in the stack, typically this will be ON_nil_uuid.

params.name: runningHash
params.doc: The running hash of this collection - each RenderMeshProvider will update the hash with its own modification hash.

constructors.name: RenderMeshes(RhinoDoc, Guid, Guid, UInt32, UInt32)
constructors.signature: public RenderMeshes(RhinoDoc doc, Guid objectId, Guid renderMeshProviderId, uint runningHash, uint flags)
constructors.summary: Create a new render primitives collection.

params.name: doc
params.doc: The Rhino document with which this collection will be associated.

params.name: objectId
params.doc: The ObjectId that this collection is for.

params.name: renderMeshProviderId
params.doc: The RenderMeshProvider that created this collection - if this is the first in the stack, typically this will be ON_nil_uuid.

params.name: runningHash
params.doc: The running hash of this collection - each RenderMeshProvider will update the hash with its own modification hash.

params.name: flags
params.doc: The flags these render meshes were created with.

methods.name: AddInstance
methods.summary: Adds a new instance to the render primitives collection.

params.name: isDisposing
params.doc: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Return an object to iterator over the instances in the collection

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Overrides default hash code function - just returns Hash

properties.name: Document
properties.summary: The document with which this IRenderMeshes object is associated.

properties.name: Hash
properties.summary: The running hash for these render meshes.

properties.name: InstanceCount
properties.summary: The number of instance objects in this collection.

properties.name: ObjectId
properties.summary: The ObjectId with which this IRenderMeshes object is associated.
